'''Harthan's shuttle''' was used by the [[Harthan family]] during diplomatic discussions with the [[Hobor]]s and the [[Troob]]s on [[Tahlboor]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]''
